import json
import re
import sys
import os

def clean_ai_message(text):
    text = re.sub(r'<thinking>.*?</thinking>', '', text, flags=re.DOTALL)
    content_match = re.search(r'<content>(.*?)</content>', text, re.DOTALL)
    if content_match:
        text = content_match.group(1)
    text = re.sub(r'<details>.*?</details>', '', text, flags=re.DOTALL)
    text = re.sub(r'<tableEdit>.*?</tableEdit>', '', text, flags=re.DOTALL)
    text = re.sub(r'<tableThink>.*?</tableThink>', '', text, flags=re.DOTALL)
    text = re.sub(r'<UpdateVariable>.*?</UpdateVariable>', '', text, flags=re.DOTALL)
    text = re.sub(r'<StatusPlaceHolderImpl/?>', '', text)
    text = re.sub(r'</?Xác nhận cơ bản>', '', text)
    text = re.sub(r'<!--.*?-->', '', text, flags=re.DOTALL)
    return text.strip()

def clean_user_message(text):
    text = re.sub(r'<EldralInit>.*?</EldralInit>', '*(Hệ thống đã tiêm thiết lập khởi tạo)*', text, flags=re.DOTALL)
    return text.strip()

def process_file(input_file):
    if not input_file.endswith('.jsonl'):
        print(f"Bo qua: {os.path.basename(input_file)} khong phai file .jsonl")
        return
        
    output_file = os.path.splitext(input_file)[0] + ".md"
    count_user = 0
    count_ai = 0
    
    try:
        with open(input_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f_in, \
             open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f_out:
            
            # Lấy tên file gốc làm tiêu đề truyện
            story_title = os.path.basename(input_file).replace('.jsonl', '')
            f_out.write(f"# {story_title}\n\n")
            
            for line in f_in:
                line = line.strip()
                if not line:
                    continue
                try:
                    data = json.loads(line)
                except json.JSONDecodeError:
                    continue
                    
                if "chat_metadata" in data or "name" not in data:
                    continue
                    
                mes = data.get("mes", "")
                if not mes:
                    continue
                    
                is_user = data.get("is_user", False)
                is_system = data.get("is_system", False)
                name = data.get("name", "Unknown")
                
                if is_user:
                    cleaned_mes = clean_user_message(mes)
                    f_out.write(f"### 🧑 Người chơi ({name})\n{cleaned_mes}\n\n---\n\n")
                    count_user += 1
                elif not is_user and not is_system:
                    cleaned_mes = clean_ai_message(mes)
                    if cleaned_mes:
                        f_out.write(f"### 🤖 Hệ thống AI\n{cleaned_mes}\n\n---\n\n")
                        count_ai += 1

        print(f"Thanh cong: {os.path.basename(output_file)} ({count_user} player, {count_ai} AI)")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Loi khi xu ly {input_file}: {e}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    if len(sys.argv) > 1:
        # Neu co tham so truyen vao (tu keo tha hoac CLI)
        for arg in sys.argv[1:]:
            process_file(arg)
    else:
        # Mac dinh neu chay truc tiep khong tham so
        default_file = "Đại Họa Thứ Tư v1.8 (Bản trải nghiệm 2.0) - 2026-05-22@23h19m15s010ms.jsonl"
        if os.path.exists(default_file):
            process_file(default_file)
        else:
            print("Khong co file de xu ly! Hay keo tha file vao hoac dung giao dien GiaoDien_ChuyenDoi_Truyen.py")

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox
import extract_story
import os

def select_and_process():
    file_paths = filedialog.askopenfilenames(
        title="Chọn các file JSONL cần chuyển đổi",
        filetypes=[("JSONL Files", "*.jsonl"), ("All Files", "*.*")]
    )
    
    if not file_paths:
        return
        
    success_count = 0
    for path in file_paths:
        try:
            extract_story.process_file(path)
            success_count += 1
        except Exception as e:
            messagebox.showerror("Lỗi", f"Lỗi khi xử lý file {os.path.basename(path)}:\n{e}")
            
    if success_count > 0:
        messagebox.showinfo(
            "Hoàn tất", 
            f"Đã bóc tách thành công {success_count} file(s) thành định dạng Markdown (.md)!\n"
            f"Các file kết quả được lưu ngay cạnh file gốc của bạn."
        )

def main():
    root = tk.Tk()
    root.title("Công cụ Bóc Tách Truyện JSONL")
    root.geometry("450x220")
    root.resizable(False, False)
    
    # Căn giữa màn hình
    root.eval('tk::PlaceWindow . center')

    label = tk.Label(
        root, 
        text="Công cụ Bóc tách Cốt Truyện từ file Chat JSONL\n(Tự động làm sạch mã code ẩn, giữ lại văn bản thuần)", 
        font=("Arial", 10),
        pady=20
    )
    label.pack()

    btn = tk.Button(
        root, 
        text="Chọn File JSONL", 
        font=("Arial", 12, "bold"), 
        bg="#4CAF50", 
        fg="white", 
        padx=30, 
        pady=10, 
        cursor="hand2",
        command=select_and_process
    )
    btn.pack(pady=10)

    footer = tk.Label(root, text="💡 Hỗ trợ chọn/quét nhiều file cùng lúc", fg="gray", pady=10)
    footer.pack(side=tk.BOTTOM)

    root.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

**[Part 1: Tell me about yourself]**
First, let me tell you who I am. As I mentioned, my name is Danh. I am 21 years old, and I come from Dong Nai province, which is a beautiful place. Regarding my appearance, I would say I look pretty average, and I am 1.65 meters tall. 

When it comes to my personality, people often say that I am a very straightforward and highly logical person. I prefer things to make sense. Because of this, my greatest strengths are my logical thinking, having a clear mindset, and being a very fast learner. When there is a new concept, I can understand the logic behind it quickly. However, nobody is perfect, and I have my weaknesses too. I find it a bit difficult to make small talk or communicate smoothly with strangers. Also, when I get excited, I tend to speak a bit too fast, which is something I am trying to improve.

In my free time, my biggest hobby is playing video games. But I don't just play any games; I am especially addicted to automation and strategy games. I love them because they force me to use my brain to solve complex problems and optimize systems. Finally, talking about my dream for the future, I don't need anything too fancy. I just want to find a stable job that fits my skills, and more importantly, I want to be a useful person who can contribute to society.

**(Dừng lại 2 giây, chuyển slide sang bức ảnh)**

**[Part 2: Describe a picture]**
Now, let's move on to the second part. I would like to describe the picture I have chosen. 

Looking at the picture, we can see a middle-aged man standing inside a modern room. He is wearing a white T-shirt with a cozy brown cardigan over it. He has a pair of large silver wireless headphones over his ears, and he is crossing his arms across his chest. 

The man is looking out through a very large glass window. Outside, we can see a bright, sunny day with trees that look like they are in the autumn season. Inside the room, right next to the window, there is a desk with a small green potted plant and what looks like a tablet or laptop. 

He has a gentle smile on his face and looks incredibly relaxed and peaceful. It seems to me that he is taking a short break from his busy work, listening to his favorite music or a podcast, and just enjoying the beautiful nature outside. I really like this picture because it gives me a sense of calm and reminds me of how important it is to take a deep breath and relax after using our brains too much.

That is the end of my presentation. Thank you so much for listening!"

When it comes to my personality, people often say that I am a very straightforward and highly logical person. I prefer things to make sense. Because of this, my greatest strengths are my logical thinking, having a clear mindset, and being a very fast learner. When there is a new concept, I can understand the logic behind it quickly. I just want to find a stable job that fits my skills, and more importantly, I want to be a useful person who can contribute to society.

The man is looking out through a very large glass window. Outside, we can see a bright, sunny day with trees that look like they are in the autumn season. Inside the room, right next to the window, there is a desk with a small green potted plant and what looks like a tablet or laptop.

He has a gentle smile on his face and looks incredibly relaxed and peaceful. It seems to me that he is taking a short break from his busy work, listening to his favorite music or a podcast, and just enjoying the beautiful nature outside. I really like this picture because it gives me a sense of calm and reminds me of how important it is to take a deep breath and relax after using our brains too much.

That is the end of my presentation. Thank you so much for listening!"
